records.question: Which high schooler is named Alexis?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT highschooler.id FROM highschooler
WHERE highschooler.name = 'Alexis'
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Highschooler WHERE name = 'Alexis'

records.question: Which highschoolers named Kris are in grade 10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT highschooler.id FROM highschooler
WHERE highschooler.name = 'Kris' AND highschooler.grade = 10
records.pred_sql: SELECT ID FROM Highschooler WHERE name = 'Kris' AND grade = 10
